items.title: жңҖе°ҸдәҢд№ҳжі•зҡ„з®—жңҜжҺЁеҜј
items.content_html:
$\hat y=a+bx$

$\begin{aligned} Q&=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{(y_i-\hat y)^2}\\\
&={(y_1-\hat y_1)^2}+{(y_2-\hat y_2)^2}+ \cdots +{(y_n-\hat y_n)^2} \end{aligned}$

е…¶дёӯ$\hat y$дёәеӣһеҪ’ж–№зЁӢпјҢжұӮ$Q$жңҖе°Ҹж—¶еӣһеҪ’ж–№зЁӢзҡ„зі»ж•°aпјҢbеҸ–еҖјгҖӮ

е…·дҪ“жҺЁеҜјеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

дёҖгҖҒйў„еӨҮе…¬ејҸ

1>

$\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{(x_i-{\bar x})^2}=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{x_i^2-n{\bar x}^2}$,

е…¶дёӯ:$\bar x=\frac {x_1+x_2+\cdots +x_n}{n}$

жҺЁеҜј:

$\begin{aligned} е·Ұиҫ№&={(x_1-\bar x_1)^2}+{(x_2-\bar x_2)^2}+ \cdots +{(x_n-\bar x_n)^2}\\\
&=x_1^2+x_2^2+ \cdots +x_n^2-2\bar xВ·(x_1+x_2+ \cdots +x_n)+n\bar x^2\\\
&=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{x_i^2}-2\bar xВ·nВ·\bar x + nВ·\bar x^2\\\
&=\displaystyle\sum^n_{i=1}{x_i^2-n\bar x^2}=еҸіиҫ№ \end{aligned}$

2>

$\displaystyle\sum^n_{i=1}{(x_i-\bar x)}{(y_i-\bar y)}=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{x_i}{y_i}-n\bar x\bar y$пјҢ

е…¶дёӯ:$\bar x=\frac {x_1+x_2+\cdots+x_n}{n},\bar y=\frac{y_1+y_2+\cdots + y_n}{n}$

жҺЁеҜјпјҡ

$\begin{aligned} е·Ұиҫ№&={(x_1-\bar x_1)}{(y_1-\bar y_1)}+{(x_2-\bar x_2)}{(y_2-\bar y_2)}+ \cdots +{(x_n-\bar x_n)}{(y_n-\bar y_n)}\\\
&=(x_1y_1+x_2y_2+\cdots+x_nВ·y_n)+n\bar xВ·\bar y-(y_1+y_2+\cdots+y_n)В·\bar x-(x_1+x_2+\cdots+x_n)В·\bar y\\\
&=\displaystyle\sum^ n_{i=1}{x_i}{y_i}+n\bar xВ·\bar y-n\bar yВ·\bar x-n\bar x\bar y\\\
&=\displaystyle\sum^n_{i=1}{x_i}{y_i}-n\bar x\bar y=еҸіиҫ№ \end{aligned}$

дәҢгҖҒжҺЁеҜјиҝҮзЁӢ

$\begin{aligned} Q &=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{(y_i-\hat y)^2}\\\
&=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{[y_i-(a+bx_i)]}^2\\\
&=(y_1^2+y_2^2+ \cdots +y_n^2)+na^2+b^2(x_1^2 + x_2^2 + \cdots +x_n^2)+2aВ·bВ·(x_1+x_2+\cdots+x_n)-2aВ·(y_1+y_2+\cdots +y_n)-2b(x_1В·y_1+x_2В·y_2+\cdots +x_nВ·y_n)\\\
&=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i^2+na^2+b^2В·\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_i^2+2abВ·nВ·\bar x-2aВ·nВ·\bar y-2bВ·\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_iy_i\\\
&=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i^2-2b\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_iy_i+b^2В·\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_i^2+na^2-nВ·2aВ·(\bar y-b\bar x)\\\
&=\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i^2-2b\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_iy_i+b^2В·\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_i^2+n[a-(\bar y-b\bar x)]^2-n[(\bar y-b\bar x)]^2\\\
&=n[(\bar y-b\bar x)]^2-n\bar y^2+2nВ·bВ·\bar xВ·\bar y-nВ·b^2В·\bar x^2+b^2В·\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_i^2-2bВ·\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_iy_i+\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i^2\\\
&=n[(\bar y-b\bar x)]^2+b^2(\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_i^2-nВ·\bar x^2)+\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i^2-nВ·\bar y^2-2bВ·(\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}x_iy_i-nВ·\bar xВ·\bar y)\\\
&=n[a-(\bar y-b\bar x)]^2+b^2{\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}(x_i-\bar x)^2}-2bВ·\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{(x_i-\bar x)(y_i-\bar y)}+\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i^2-nВ·\bar y^2\\\
&=n[a-(\bar y-b\bar x)]^2+{\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}(x_i-\bar x)^2}В·\left [b^2-2bВ·\frac {\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}(x_i-\bar x)(y_i-\bar y)}{\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{(x_i-\bar x)^2}}\right ] +\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i-nВ·\bar y^2\\\
&=n[a-(\bar y-b\bar x)]^2+{\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}(x_i-\bar x)^2}В·\left [b-\frac {\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}(x_i-\bar x)(y_i-\bar y)}{\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{(x_i-\bar x)^2}}\right ]^2-\frac {\left [{\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}}(x_i-{\bar x})(y_i-\bar y)\right ]^2}{\displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}{(x_i-\bar x)^2}}+ \displaystyle \sum^n_{i=1}y_i-nВ·\bar y^2 \end{aligned}$
еӣ дёәпјҡ

е’Ң

еҸҠ

дёәеёёж•°гҖӮ

жүҖд»Ҙ:
